main_projects.title: Adaptable Phone UI Hackathon
main_projects.description: A context-aware mobile UI that dynamically adapts themes and app availability based on user routines.
main_projects.technical_depth: Implemented complex state-based routing and context-switching logic to handle real-time UI adaptation.
main_projects.impact: Winner of departmental innovation award; optimized UI response time to under 100ms.

main_projects.title: LeetCode Analysis Pipeline
main_projects.description: Automated pipeline to crawl and analyze competitive programming metrics.
main_projects.technical_depth: Built a robust scraping and parsing engine capable of handling dynamic LeetCode DOM structures.
main_projects.impact: Automated the evaluation of 500+ candidate profiles.

portfolio_verdict: Projects demonstrate a deep understanding of data scraping and real-time UI adaptation. Strong evidence of backend logic complexity and tool-building capabilities.
